name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.5.2: packaging metadata adjustments for Volumio plugin store submission. Added 'os: bookworm' to match the volumio-plugins-sources-bookworm submission target. Removed i386 from architectures (the bookworm store accepts armhf and amd64 only). v0.5.1: added repository field; removed arm64 from architectures.
